summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HH Jaba Staff Portal iteration 4 features. Backend API testing achieved 100% success rate (11/11 tests passed). Frontend UI testing confirmed all requested features are working correctly including UUID-based invoice IDs, payment type selector (credit/cash), 6 tabs (Manual Invoices removed), pending orders with status badges, defaulters per-item breakdown, WhatsApp/Email share buttons, and Generate Invoice button in reconciliation.

backend: POST /api/admin/credit-invoices with payment_type='credit' creates unpaid invoice with UUID-based ID
POST /api/admin/credit-invoices with payment_type='cash' creates paid invoice with all items marked 'paid'
Multiple invoices created quickly have unique UUID-based IDs (no collisions)
GET /api/admin/pending-orders returns both pending AND recently fulfilled orders
POST /api/admin/auto-generate-invoice/{user_id} creates invoice with UUID-based ID
GET /api/admin/defaulters returns orders with per-item breakdown (order_id, created_at, items with product_name, quantity, price)
frontend: AdminDashboard has exactly 6 tabs (Pending, Stock, Reconcile, Defaulters, Invoices, Feedback) - Manual Invoices tab removed
Pending orders tab shows status badge (pending/fulfilled) on each order card
Pending orders shows Fulfill/Cancel buttons ONLY for pending orders (not for fulfilled)
Credit Invoices tab now labeled 'Invoices' and handles both credit and cash
CreditInvoiceModule Create dialog has 'Payment Type' selector (Credit/Cash)
Invoice preview has WhatsApp share button (data-testid='share-whatsapp-btn')
Invoice preview has Email share button (data-testid='share-email-btn')
Invoice list cards have WhatsApp and Email share icons (8 each found)
Defaulters tab shows per-item breakdown table with columns: Order ID, Timestamp, Flavor, Qty, Amount
Reconciliation tab has 'Generate Invoice' button per user (data-testid='generate-invoice-{user_id}')
Reconciliation tab has 'Share Report' button per user
Reconciliation tab has 'Delete User' button per user

seed_data_creation: Used existing admin session token 'test-admin-590d57625292' and test user 'user_5463750c8ece'. Created test credit order for auto-invoice generation testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features are fully functional: (1) Invoice ID generation now uses UUID to prevent collisions (format: HHJ-INV-[Date]-[UUID5]), (2) Payment type field works - 'credit' creates unpaid invoice, 'cash' auto-marks all items as paid, (3) Manual Invoices tab removed - consolidated under 'Invoices' tab, (4) Pending orders endpoint returns both pending AND recently fulfilled orders (last 2 hours), (5) Defaulters tab shows per-item breakdown with Order ID, Timestamp, Flavor, Qty, Amount columns, (6) WhatsApp/Email share buttons on invoice preview and list cards, (7) Generate Invoice button per user in reconciliation tab. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_features.py.

uuid_invoice_id.frontend: Invoice IDs displayed correctly (e.g., HHJ-INV-20260323-85B4D) - WORKING

payment_type.backend: payment_type='credit' creates unpaid, payment_type='cash' creates paid - WORKING
payment_type.frontend: Payment Type selector in create dialog with Credit/Cash options - WORKING

manual_invoices_removed.frontend: 6 tabs confirmed (Manual Invoices tab removed) - WORKING

pending_orders_with_fulfilled.backend: GET /api/admin/pending-orders returns pending + recent fulfilled - WORKING
pending_orders_with_fulfilled.frontend: Status badges (pending/fulfilled) shown, action buttons only for pending - WORKING

defaulters_breakdown.backend: GET /api/admin/defaulters returns orders with items - WORKING
defaulters_breakdown.frontend: Per-item breakdown table with Order ID, Timestamp, Flavor, Qty, Amount - WORKING

whatsapp_email_share.backend: N/A - frontend only (uses wa.me and mailto: URLs)
whatsapp_email_share.frontend: WhatsApp and Email buttons on invoice preview and list cards - WORKING

generate_invoice_button.frontend: Generate Invoice button per user in reconciliation tab - WORKING
